theme: Do you think art and music education should be req

sentences.english: Do you think art and music education should be required in schools?
sentences.korean: 예술과 음악 교육이 학교에서 필수여야 한다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I firmly believe that art and music education should be required in all schools.
sentences.korean: 예술과 음악 교육이 모든 학교에서 필수여야 한다고 확고히 믿어요.

sentences.english: First arts education develops creativity which is the most important skill for innovation in any field.
sentences.korean: 첫째 예술 교육은 창의성을 발달시켜요. 어떤 분야에서든 혁신에 가장 중요한 기술이에요.

sentences.english: Even Steve Jobs credited his calligraphy class for inspiring the beautiful typography in Apple products.
sentences.korean: 스티브 잡스조차 서예 수업이 애플 제품의 아름다운 타이포그래피에 영감을 줬다고 했어요.

sentences.english: Second learning an instrument or painting teaches patience and discipline in ways that math and science classes simply cannot.
sentences.korean: 둘째 악기나 그림을 배우는 것은 수학과 과학 수업이 할 수 없는 방식으로 인내와 규율을 가르쳐줘요.

sentences.english: Cutting arts programs to save money is short-sighted because it sacrifices long-term creative development for short-term budget savings.
sentences.korean: 예산 절감을 위해 예술 프로그램을 없애는 것은 근시안적이에요. 단기 예산 절감을 위해 장기적 창의적 발달을 희생하니까요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think art and music education should be req
